excerpt: Today, we’re excited to announce the availability of Anthropic’s most advanced Sonnet model, Claude Sonnet 5, on Amazon Bedrock and Claude Platform on AWS. Claude Sonnet 5 is the first Sonnet model of Anthropic’s latest generation and represents a meaningful step forward. It delivers top-tier intelligence at Sonnet pricing for coding, agents, and everyday professional […]

title: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 on AWS: Anthropic’s most capable Sonnet model
